rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCES F CUENY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Sanctions For Disobedience Of Prior Court Order Against George Fuller
rulings.Rulings: Robert Schafer's Motion For Sanctions For Disobedience Of Prior Court Order Against George Fuller is granted. No opposition has been filed. The request for monetary sanctions is denied as there is no declaration in support of an amount of monetary sanctions. [C.C.P. Section 2023.040] (612/HEWLETT)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCES F CUENY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Sanctions For Disobedience Of Prior Court Order Against Georgia Fuller
rulings.Rulings: PETITIONER ROBERT SCHAFER'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS FOR DISOBEDIENCE OF PRIOR COURT ORDER AGAINST GEORGIA FULLER IS OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. (612/HEWLETT)
